creator: ooonea@gmail.com
text: I'm on FreeBSD 13.1 (the same thing happened yesterday on 13.0): switching to the latest branch of the pkg repo, the amdgpu driver of drm-kmod crashes the system which fails to finish booting and reboots. I tried switching to latest using a dedicated Boot Environment. By removing the amdgpu driver from rc.conf, the system boots normally. The quarterly version has no problems.
